examples: Its general effect was soft edged and tonal.
There is little tonal variety in his voice.
Languages in East Asia tend to have tonal vowels, and those of the north-eastern Caucasus are known for consonantal complexity: Ubykh has 78 consonant sounds.
Tonal quality is a subjective measurement, of course, and Stradivarius violins vary in their tones.
In a tonal composition, harmonic movement is the "plot" that propels the listener through time.
